name: sylvester-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Sylvester Francis.

plugins.name: go-toolkit
plugins.description: Go developer-productivity skills: scaffolding (with golang-standards/project-layout), debugging, testing, refactoring/review, and performance profiling.

plugins.name: typescript-toolkit
plugins.description: TypeScript developer-productivity skills: scaffolding (Node/NestJS apps and npm libraries), debugging, testing, refactoring/type-safety, and performance profiling.

plugins.name: model-orchestration
plugins.description: Tiered model orchestration for substantial tasks: plan with Opus (max effort), execute with Sonnet, and cross-verify with Haiku or Sonnet via an independent, adversarial pass.
